generated_adapters.name: Codex prompt adapter
generated_adapters.description: Native Codex prompt projection generated from the neutral workflow prompt source.

generated_adapters.name: GitHub Copilot instructions adapter
generated_adapters.description: GitHub Copilot repository instructions generated from the neutral workflow prompt source.

planned_adapters.description: Claude Code project instructions and command files generated from the same workflow source.
Cursor rules generated from the shared workflow and policy source.
Continue rules generated from the shared workflow and policy source.
Windsurf rules generated from the shared workflow and policy source.
Tool-neutral Markdown and schema bundle for humans or tools without a native adapter.

install_layer.selection_model: Install and update target repositories with explicit adapter choices, for example --adapters codex,claude,cursor. Runtime startup should choose an active agent for session context, not rewrite installed policy files.

codex_skill_pack.name: Agent Workflow Kit Codex Skills
codex_skill_pack.description: Codex skill folders generated from selected agent-workflow-kit prompts.

skills.name: agent-workflow-review
skills.description: Use when reviewing a repository, pull request, diff, or local codebase with agent-workflow-kit review-risk routing, reviewer personas, synthesis, and evidence-backed findings.

skills.name: agent-workflow-task-packet
skills.description: Use when turning a backlog item, issue, accepted review finding, or broad human request into a scoped executable task packet with validation and closeout evidence.

skills.name: agent-workflow-implementation
skills.description: Use when planning, implementing, or verifying scoped remediation work after a finding, task packet, or TDD prompt has defined the executable change.

skills.name: agent-workflow-tdd
skills.description: Use when designing executable specs, regression tests, characterization tests, contract tests, property tests, TCR loops, or refactors under tests.

skills.name: agent-workflow-research
skills.description: Use when running bounded source-specific research that produces backlog, review, architecture, design, ADR, risk, or task-packet candidates from auditable evidence.

skills.name: agent-workflow-learning-comments
skills.description: Use when adding behavior-neutral learning comments or separate non-developer explanations for important codebase concepts without changing runtime behavior.
